title: calathea exscapa
intro: Calathea exscapa is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, commonly known as the prayer plant due to its unique leaf movement. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Calathea exscapa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
